title: The Impossible Attic
lines: You slam the attic hatch shut and bolt it just as the first zombie reaches the top of the stairs. The pounding on the wood is relentless.
You turn around and freeze. The attic is filled with strange, charcoal drawings of multi-eyed monsters and impossible geometry.
On the far wall, a section of wallpaper is peeling away, revealing a faint, unearthly violet light glowing from the gaps in the wood.
